changeSet.author: miguelafr
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE PRICES ( ID BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, BRAND_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, START_DATE TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL, END_DATE TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL, PRICE_LIST BIGINT NOT NULL, PRODUCT_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, PRIORITY INT NOT NULL, PRICE DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL, CURR CHAR(3) NOT NULL );
